zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Kennedy of Ardmillan於1578年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis34歲，母親Lady Elizabeth McGill23歲。他和Marion Crauford至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1637年2月在英國蘇格蘭享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Kennedy of Ardmillan于1578年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis34岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth McGill23岁。他和Marion Crauford至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1637年2月在英国苏格兰享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.
Korean: variant of   O  .
Japanese: variant of Ō (see O ).

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Kennedy of Ardmillan was born in 1578, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis, was 34 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth McGill, was 23. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Marion Crauford. He died in February 1637, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Kennedy of Ardmillan est né en 1578, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth McGill, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Marion Crauford. Il est décédé en février 1637, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Kennedy of Ardmillan 1578 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis 34 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth McGill 23. Er hatte mit Marion Crauford mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Februar 1637 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Kennedy of Ardmillan è nato il nel 1578 nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Kennedy Master of Cassillis, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth McGill, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Marion Crauford. Morì nel febbraio 1637, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.
